name: seungwoon_claude
description: Requirements analysis and file-based planning skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: analyze-requirements
plugins.description: Structured requirements analysis workflow with Jira integration, phased investigation, and feedback loops. Creates docs/{branch}/ folder with progress tracking, context, decisions, requirements, and solution files.

plugins.name: planning-with-files
plugins.description: Manus-style file-based planning for complex tasks. Creates task_plan.md, findings.md, and progress.md as persistent working memory on disk. Includes session recovery and completion hooks.
